original_statement: how many games did it take before the team scored at least 20 points.
mutated_statement: how many things did it take before the group did something at some level.
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Noun generalization + Action generalization + Quantitative information generalization: 'team' generalized to vague 'group' | 'games' (specific event type) generalized to 'things' | 'scored' (specific action) replaced by vague 'did something' | 'at least 20 points' (explicit number and unit) removed/blurred to 'at some level' (team→group | games→things | scored→did something | at least 20 points→at some level)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据iteration 0中的judge_thought（“Interpreting the question as how many games it took before the group (team) achieved its first win... Therefore, it took 2 games.”）可见关键信息：Agent直接把变异问题逆向映射回原始情境并给出具体数值“2”。具体表现为：没有在judge_thought中提到任何模糊性、歧义或澄清请求；未提出反问或说明需要更多信息；直接按自身理解计算并给出确定答案。因而符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义：Agent将模糊的替代词视为明确问题并直接作答，未表现出对问题不明确性的认知或澄清意图。
